methodsAttempted.query: site:ada.edu.az Artificial Intelligence ADA University policy students
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl official-domain search returned AI events, news, school/course pages, research repository records, and the academic catalogue.

methodsAttempted.query: site:ada.edu.az ChatGPT OR generative AI OR GenAI ADA University
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found an official generative-AI lecture event, repository publications, faculty profile/research records, and conference pages, but no current public AI-use policy.

methodsAttempted.query: site:ada.edu.az academic integrity ADA University plagiarism catalog policy
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found official ADA University Honor Code, Student Assessment Regulations, Academic Catalogue, and other academic integrity policy PDFs.

methodsAttempted.query: site:ada.edu.az AI policy ADA University students assessment
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl official-domain search returned no AI-policy-specific result.

methodsAttempted.query: site:ada.edu.az Responsible and Practical AI Use in Education ADA University
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search surfaced an updated 2025-2026 Academic Catalogue URL; a follow-up exact search surfaced a newer April 6, 2026 official PDF.

artifacts.summary: Official-domain discovery did not find a current public ADA University AI-use policy, generative AI student guidance, approved AI tools rule, or AI data/privacy/security rule. Verified official sources for adjacent context are the April 6, 2026 Academic Catalogue, the Honor Code, and Student Assessment Regulations. AI-specific search hits were events, research/repository records, school/course listings, or superseded catalogue files and were rejected as policy evidence.

targets.sourceTitle: ADA University Academic Catalogue 2025-2026 Academic Year

stopConditions: Stop after current official catalogue plus adjacent official integrity and assessment rules are verified.
Do not infer an AI-specific university policy from AI course titles, events, research records, or repository theses.
Create only source-status or adjacent-context claims when no AI-specific official policy source is found.

artifacts.title: ADA University AI Policy Source Review
artifacts.summary: Official-source review for ADA University did not find a current public AI-specific conduct policy. The staged candidates therefore record source-status and adjacent official academic-integrity/assessment context from the current 2025-2026 Academic Catalogue, Honor Code, and Student Assessment Regulations. AI-related event pages, research repository records, and superseded catalogue PDFs were rejected as policy evidence.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No AI-specific ADA University policy was found in public official sources during this run; adjacent academic-integrity claims must not be interpreted as AI-specific rules.
AI course titles, events, and repository research records were not treated as binding policy evidence.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
